titleStmt.title: SII 26.200: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 200. (A.R. No. 188 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records an order of the deity Ādi-Chaṇḍēśvara, granting the right called tachchāchāriyakkāṇi in the temple of Avināśi Āḷuḍaiyanāyaṉār, to two artisans named Uḍaiyāṉ Nāyakapiḷḷai alias Aḻagiyaśēmāchāri of Tirumarudantuṟai and Uḍaiyān Uḍaiyāṉ alias Eḻukaraināṭṭu-āchāri, and enjoining upon them to attend to the ten kinds of repairs in the temple in lieu of the right given to them.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . caṇḍeśvaranolai sāgarañcūḻvaiyyakattuk kaṇṭīśvaran karumamārāyka paṇṭe Aṟañceytāṉ ceytāṉ Aṟaṅkāttāṉ pātantiṟampāmaṟ ceṉṉivaittu Aruḷāḷa Āticaṇṭeśvaraṉ Ātecam
nam Ācāri tirumarutantuṟai Uṭaiyāṉ nāyakappiḷḷaiyāṉa Aḻakiyacemaācārikkum Uṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyāṉāṉa Eḻukaraināṭṭu Ācārikkum nam Olai kuṭutta paricāvatu tāṅkaḷ pramādodha samvatsarattu vaikā
ci mātam mutal Uṭaiyār Aviṉāci Āḷuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyilil taccācāriyakkāṇi taṅkaḷukku kuṭukkaiyil Ikkoyilukku varum daśakriyaiyum tāṅkaḷe ceytu Ittāl varum Aṭaṅkal peṟupeṟṟuIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
